mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (order_id, reviewer_id, target_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{reviewerId}, #{targetId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}

SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reviewer_nickname, p.product_id AS product_id, p.title AS product_title, (SELECT pi.url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY pi.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS product_cover FROM review r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.reviewer_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = r.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE r.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
